adaptedResources.author: DscSamples
adaptedResources.description: The `YarnInstall` DSC resource is used to install all Yarn packages listed in a `package.json` file.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Arguments.title: Arguments
Arguments.description: Additional arguments to pass to `yarn install`.

PackageDirectory.title: PackageDirectory
PackageDirectory.description: The directory containing the `package.json` file. If not specified, the current directory is used.

Dependencies.title: Dependencies
Dependencies.description: A read-only list of currently installed package dependencies. This property is not configurable.

embedded.description: The `YarnInstall` DSC resource is used to install all Yarn packages listed in a `package.json` file.
embedded.title: YarnDsc/YarnInstall
